channel.title: Hack-a-Thon on Bradin Rohde
channel.description: Recent content in Hack-a-Thon on Bradin Rohde

item.title: HackUSU 2026: $hame
item.author: bradinrohde0@gmail.com (Bradin Rohde)
item.description: The yearly Hack-A-Thon put on by Utah State University. This year me and my team competed in the Tool Development category, developing a program we call “$hame”. The idea was that we want the terminal to cause more stress, and the more you misspell commands, the more you get punished for it. I’ll be talking about our experience in building the project, as well as my other thoughts of the event.
